creator: frankch@waru.life.nthu.edu.tw
text:
This is a port of rxvt 2.4.1 with Chinese big5 support. The patch
        make rxvt capable of displaying Chinese characters. It also provide
        support of Chinese input through XCIN(if the user installed XCIN).

Fix: 

The port tarball is in ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming,
        the file name is cn-rxvt-2.4.1-port.tar.gz
